detaileddescription.para: Start.
Stop.
Clear.
Start the PWM.
Stop the PWM.
Capture the counter value on channel 0.
Capture the counter value on channel 1.
Capture the counter value on channel 2.
Capture the counter value on channel 3.
Capture the counter value on channel 4.
Capture the counter value on channel 5.

briefdescription.para: GRTC tasks.

detaileddescription.para: Compare 0 event.
Compare 1 event.
Compare 2 event.
Compare 3 event.
Compare 4 event.
Compare 5 event.
RTCOUNTER compare event.
RTCOUNTER synchronized compare event.
SYSCOUNTER value valid event.
End of PWM period event.

briefdescription.para: GRTC events.

detaileddescription.para: Shortcut between RTCOMPARE event and CLEAR task.

briefdescription.para: Types of GRTC shortcuts.

detaileddescription.para: The SYSCOUNTER register's content will be used as the reference.
The CC[n] register's content will be used as the reference.

briefdescription.para: Types of GRTC CC references.

detaileddescription.para: GRTC interrupt from compare event on channel 0.
GRTC interrupt from compare event on channel 1.
GRTC interrupt from compare event on channel 2.
GRTC interrupt from compare event on channel 3.
GRTC interrupt from compare event on channel 4.
GRTC interrupt from compare event on channel 5.
GRTC interrupt from RTCOUNTER compare event.
GRTC interrupt from RTCOUNTER synchronized compare event.
GRTC interrupt from SYSCOUNTER valid event.

briefdescription.para: GRTC interrupts.

detaileddescription.para: Enable 32K clock output on pin.
Enable fast clock output on pin.

briefdescription.para: Configuration of clock output.

detaileddescription.para: LFXO oscillator as the clock source.
System LFCLK as the clock source.
System LFLPRC as the clock source.

briefdescription.para: Configuration of the GRTC clock source selection.
Function for setting the compare value of channel for the SYSCOUNTER.

simplesect.para: The corresponding event is automatically disabled by hardware during the operation.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
The specified capture/compare channel.
Compare value to be set in 1 MHz units.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the capture/compare value of channel for the SYSCOUNTER.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
The specified capture/compare channel.

simplesect.para: Value from the specified capture/compare register in 1MHz units.

memberdef.argsstring: (NRF_GRTC_Type *p_reg, uint8_t cc_channel, uint32_t value, nrf_grtc_cc_add_reference_t reference)
memberdef.name: nrf_grtc_sys_counter_cc_add_set

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the value to be added to capture/compare register for the SYSCOUNTER.

simplesect.para: There are two available configurations of adding operation: When reference value equals NRF_GRTC_CC_ADD_REFERENCE_SYSCOUNTER then the final value of capture/compare register is a sum of SYSCOUNTER current value and value. When reference value equals NRF_GRTC_CC_ADD_REFERENCE_CC then the final value of capture/compare register is a sum of current capture/compare value and value. If the capture/compare register overflows after this write, then the corresponding event is generated immediately.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
The specified capture/compare channel.
Value to be added in 1 MHz units.
Configuration of adding mode.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting a compare value for the RTCOUNTER.

simplesect.para: The internal synchronization mechanism ensures that the desired value will be properly latched by the GRTC. However when sync parameter is true then the process of capturing the value lasts up to two 32 kHz cycles. If the sync parameter is false then the capturing the value will occur on the following rising edge of 32 kHz clock. In this case it is user's responsibility to execute the function between the 32 kHz rising edges.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Compare value to be set in 32 kHz units.
True if the internal synchronization mechanism shall be used, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Function for returning the compare value for the RTCOUNTER.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

simplesect.para: Value from the capture/compare register in 32 kHz units.

briefdescription.para: Function for enabling specified interrupts.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Mask of interrupts to be enabled. Use nrf_grtc_int_mask_t values for bit masking.

briefdescription.para: Function for disabling specified interrupts.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Mask of interrupts to be disabled. Use nrf_grtc_int_mask_t values for bit masking.

briefdescription.para: Function for checking if the specified interrupts are enabled.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Mask of interrupts to be checked. Use nrf_grtc_int_mask_t values for bit masking.

simplesect.para: Mask of enabled interrupts.

briefdescription.para: Function for retrieving the state of pending interrupts.

simplesect.para: States of pending interrupt are saved as a bitmask. One set at particular position means that interrupt for event is pending.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

simplesect.para: Bitmask with information about pending interrupts. Use nrf_grtc_int_mask_t values for bit masking.

briefdescription.para: Function for enabling interrupts in the specified group.

simplesect.para: Not all group_idx might be valid. Refer to the Product Specification for more information.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Index of interrupt group to be enabled.
Mask of interrupts to be enabled. Use nrf_grtc_int_mask_t values for bit masking.

briefdescription.para: Function for disabling interrupts in the specified group.

simplesect.para: Not all group_idx might be valid. Refer to the Product Specification for more information.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Index of interrupt group to be disabled.
Mask of interrupts to be disabled. Use nrf_grtc_int_mask_t values for bit masking.

briefdescription.para: Function for checking if the specified interrupts from a given group are enabled.

simplesect.para: Not all group_idx might be valid. Refer to the Product Specification for more information.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Index of interrupt group to be checked.
Mask of interrupts to be checked. Use nrf_grtc_int_mask_t values for bit masking.

simplesect.para: Mask of enabled interrupts.

briefdescription.para: Function for enabling events.

simplesect.para: Only specific events can be individually enabled or disabled.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Mask of event flags to be enabled.

briefdescription.para: Function for disabling events.

simplesect.para: Only specific events can be individually enabled or disabled.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Mask of event flags to be disabled.

briefdescription.para: Function for enabling the specified shortcuts.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Bitmask of shortcuts to be enabled.

briefdescription.para: Function for disabling the specified shortcuts.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Bitmask of shortcuts to be disabled.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the specified shortcuts.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Bitmask of shortcuts to be set.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the subscribe configuration for a given GRTC task.

simplesect.para: Not every task has its corresponding subscribe register. Refer to the Product Specification for more information.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Task for which to set the configuration.
Channel through which to subscribe events.

briefdescription.para: Function for clearing the subscribe configuration for a given GRTC task.

simplesect.para: Not every task has its corresponding subscribe register. Refer to the Product Specification for more information.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Task for which to clear the configuration.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the subscribe configuration for a given GRTC task.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Task for which to read the configuration.

simplesect.para: GRTC subscribe configuration.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the publish configuration for a given GRTC event.

simplesect.para: Not every event has its corresponding publish register. Refer to the Product Specification for more information.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Event for which to set the configuration.
Channel through which to publish the event.

briefdescription.para: Function for clearing the publish configuration for a given GRTC event.

simplesect.para: Not every event has its corresponding publish register. Refer to the Product Specification for more information.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Event for which to clear the configuration.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the publish configuration for a given GRTC event.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Event for which to read the configuration.

simplesect.para: GRTC publish configuration.

briefdescription.para: Function for retrieving the state of the GRTC event.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Event to be checked.
The event has been generated.
The event has not been generated.

briefdescription.para: Function for clearing an event.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Event to be cleared.

briefdescription.para: Function for returning the lower 32-bits of RTCOUNTER value.

simplesect.para: The whole RTCOUNTER value is latched when nrf_grtc_rt_counter_low_get function is executed. Thus nrf_grtc_rt_counter_low_get must be executed before calling nrf_grtc_rt_counter_high_get.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

simplesect.para: Lower part of RTCOUNTER value.

briefdescription.para: Function for returning the higher 32-bits of RTCOUNTER value.

simplesect.para: The whole RTCOUNTER value is latched when nrf_grtc_rt_counter_low_get function is executed. Thus nrf_grtc_rt_counter_low_get must be executed before calling nrf_grtc_rt_counter_high_get.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

simplesect.para: Higher part of RTCOUNTER value.

briefdescription.para: Function for returning the lower 32-bits of SYSCOUNTER value.

simplesect.para: nrf_grtc_sys_counter_low_get must be executed before calling nrf_grtc_sys_counter_high_get. In addition, after this, nrf_grtc_sys_counter_overflow_check should be called. If it retuns true, whole procedure should be repeated.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

simplesect.para: Lower part of SYSCOUNTER value.

briefdescription.para: Function for returning the higher 32-bits of SYSCOUNTER value.

simplesect.para: nrf_grtc_sys_counter_low_get must be executed before calling nrf_grtc_sys_counter_high_get. In addition, after this, nrf_grtc_sys_counter_overflow_check should be called. If it retuns true, whole procedure should be repeated.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

simplesect.para: Higher part SYSCOUNTER value.

briefdescription.para: Function for returning the 64-bit SYSCOUNTER value.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

simplesect.para: SYSCOUNTER value.

briefdescription.para: Function for checking whether the lower 32-bits of SYSCOUNTER overflowed after last execution of nrf_grtc_sys_counter_low_get.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
if the lower 32-bits of SYSCOUNTER overflowed, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Function for returning the lower 32-bits of SYSCOUNTER value of the specified index.

simplesect.para: Not all index might be valid. Refer to the Product Specification for more information.

nrf_grtc_sys_counter_low_indexed_get must be executed before calling nrf_grtc_sys_counter_high_indexed_get. In addition, after this, nrf_grtc_sys_counter_overflow_indexed_check should be called. If it retuns true, whole procedure should be repeated.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Index of the domain for which the lower part of the SYSCOUNTER is to be read.

simplesect.para: Lower part of SYSCOUNTER value.

briefdescription.para: Function for returning the higher 32-bits of SYSCOUNTER value of the specified index.

simplesect.para: Not all index might be valid. Refer to the Product Specification for more information.

nrf_grtc_sys_counter_low_indexed_get must be executed before calling nrf_grtc_sys_counter_high_indexed_get. In addition, after this, nrf_grtc_sys_counter_overflow_indexed_check should be called. If it retuns true, whole procedure should be repeated.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Index of the domain for which the higher part of the SYSCOUNTER is to be read.

simplesect.para: Higher part SYSCOUNTER value.

briefdescription.para: Function for returning the 64-bit SYSCOUNTER value of the specified index.

simplesect.para: Not all index might be valid. Refer to the Product Specification for more information.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Index of the domain for which the SYSCOUNTER value is to be read.

simplesect.para: SYSCOUNTER value of specified index.

briefdescription.para: Function for checking whether the lower 32-bits of SYSCOUNTER overflowed after last execution of nrf_grtc_sys_counter_low_indexed_get.

simplesect.para: Not all index might be valid. Refer to the Product Specification for more information.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Index of the domain for which the SYSCOUNTER overflow is to be checked.
if the lower 32-bits of the specified SYSCOUNTER overflowed, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the request to keep the SYSCOUNTER active.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
True if the SYSCOUNTER channel is to be kept active, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Function for checking whether the SYSCOUNTER is requested to remain active.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
if SYSCOUNTER channel is requested to remain active, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the request for the specified domain to keep the SYSCOUNTER active.

simplesect.para: Not all index might be valid. Refer to the Product Specification for more information.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Index of the domain for which the SYSCOUNTER active request is to be set.
True if the SYSCOUNTER for the specified domain is to be kept active, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Function for checking whether the specified domain requests the SYSCOUNTER to remain active.

simplesect.para: Not all index might be valid. Refer to the Product Specification for more information.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Index of the domain for which the SYSCOUNTER active request is to be checked.
if the specified domain requests the SYSCOUNTER to remain active, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Function for returning the address of an event.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Requested event.

simplesect.para: Address of the requested event register.

briefdescription.para: Function for returning the address of a task.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Requested task.

simplesect.para: Address of the requested task register.

briefdescription.para: Function for starting a task.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Requested task.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the 1 MHz SYSCOUNTER timer capture task associated with the specified channel.

parameterdescription.para: Capture channel.

simplesect.para: Capture task.

briefdescription.para: Function for enabling SYSCOUNTER compare event.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Channel number of compare event to be enabled.

briefdescription.para: Function for disabling SYSCOUNTER compare event.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Channel number of compare event to be disabled.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the SYSCOUNTER compare event associated with the specified compare cc_channel.

parameterdescription.para: Compare channel number.

simplesect.para: Requested compare event.

briefdescription.para: Function for checking whether the specified capture/compare channel is enabled.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Channel to be checked.
Specified channel is enabled.
Specified channel is disabled.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the SYSCOUNTER.

simplesect.para: When the SYSCOUNTER is disabled the GRTC uses RTCOUNTER by default.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
True if SYSCOUNTER is to be enabled, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting automatic mode for the SYSCOUNTER.

simplesect.para: When enable is false then the SYSCOUNTER remains active when KEEPRUNNING is set, or any task register, INT register or SYSCOUNTER register is being accessed. When enable is true then in addition the SYSCOUNTER remains active when any local CPU that is not sleeping keeps the SYSCOUNTER active.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
True if the automatic mode is to be enabled, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Function for checking whether the SYSCOUNTER has automatic mode enabled.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

simplesect.para: True Automatic mode is enabled.
False Automatic mode is disabled.

briefdescription.para: Function for checking whether the SYSCOUNTER is in active state.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
if the SYSCOUNTER is active, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the request to keep the SYSCOUNTER active.

simplesect.para: This function modifies the KEEPRUNNING register, which possesses information whether any local CPU needs keeping the SYSCOUNTER active.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
True if the automatic mode is to be enabled, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Function for checking whether the SYSCOUNTER is requested to remain active.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
if request for keeping the SYSCOUNTER is active, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the domains that requested the SYSCOUNTER to remain active.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Domains mask.
of domains that keep the SYSCOUNTER active.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the periodic compare event for capture/compare channel 0.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Period value in 1 MHz units.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the value of interval for periodic capture/compare event for channel 0.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
of the interval in 1 MHz units.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the periodic compare value of channel for the SYSCOUNTER.

simplesect.para: The corresponding event occurs periodically by hardware during the operation.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
The specified capture/compare channel.
Period value in 1 MHz units.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the value of interval for periodic capture/compare event of channel for the SYSCOUNTER.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
The specified capture/compare channel.
of the interval in 1 MHz units.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the timeout value for GRTC.

simplesect.para: Timeout between all CPUs going to sleep and stopping the SYSCOUNTER.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Timeout value in 32 kHz units.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the value of the timeout value for GRTC.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
of the timeout in 32 kHz units.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the wake time value for GRTC.

simplesect.para: The wake time is maximum number of 32 kHz cycles takes to restore the APB registers when waking from sleep state.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Wake time value in 32 kHz units.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the wake time value.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
of wake time in 32 kHz units.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the PWM compare value.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
PWM compare value.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the PWM compare value.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
of PWM compare.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the specified clock source to be connected to output pin.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Selected clkout source.
True if the clkout source is to be enabled, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Function for checking whether clock source is connected to clkout pin.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Selected clkout source.
if the clkout source is enabled, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the fast clock divisor value of clock output.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Fast clock divisor value.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the fast clock divisor value of clock output.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
clock divisor value.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the clock source for the GRTC low-frequency clock.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Selected clock source.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the clock source of the GRTC low-frequency clock.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

simplesect.para: Clock source configuration.

briefdescription.para: Symbol indicating whether GRTC has PWM registers.
Symbol indicating whether GRTC has clock output registers.
Symbol indicating whether GRTC has clock source selection.
Symbol indicating whether RC oscillator clock source is available.
Symbol indicating whether crystal oscillator clock source is available.
Symbol indicating whether GRTC has multiple SYSCOUNTER registers.
Symbol indicating whether SYSCOUNTERVALID event is present.
Symbol indicating whether SYSCOUNTERH LOADED bit is present.
Symbol indicating whether KEEPRUNNING register is present.
Symbol indicating whether MINTERVAL register is present.
Symbol indicating whether INTERVAL register is present.
Symbol indicating whether GRTC has RTCOUNTER.
Symbol indicating whether RTCOMPARE synchronization event is present.
Symbol indicating whether GRTC has extended functionality.
Symbol indicating whether GRTC interrupt groups are present.
Symbol indicating actual domain index.
Symbol indicating actual SYSCOUNTER index.
Number of capture/compare channels for SYSCOUNTER.
Maximum value of INTERVAL register content.
Maximum value of MINTERVAL register content.
Number of MINTERVAL registers.
Interrupts INTEN register definition.
Interrupts INTENSET register definition.
Interrupts INTENCLR register definition.
Interrupts INTPEND register definition.
Main SYSCOUNTER frequency in Hz.
Number of capture/compare channels for SYSCOUNTER.
Bitmask of the higher 32-bits of capture/compare register for the SYSCOUNTER.
Bitmask of CCADD register for the SYSCOUNTER.
Bitmask of the lower part of the SYSCOUNTER value.
Bitmask of the higher part of the SYSCOUNTER value.
Bitmask of the higher 32-bits of capture/compare register for the RTCOUNTER.
Bitmask of the OVERFLOW bit.
Bitmask of the BUSY bit.
Maximum value of TIMEOUT register content.
Maximum value of WAKETIME register content.
Maximum value of CLKFASTDIV register content.
Macro for creating the interrupt bitmask for the specified compare channel.
Bitmask of interrupt enable.
Mask for all channels represented by CC channels.
Hardware access layer for managing the Global Real Time Counter (GRTC) peripheral.
